tasks.title: Find edge in Kalshi crypto markets using real-time price data
tasks.description: Build crypto_edge_analysis.py — RUNNABLE Python script that: 1) calls CoinGecko API for live BTC/ETH prices, 2) calls Kalshi public API to list crypto markets, 3) prices each binary option using lognormal model P=N(ln(S/K)/(sigma*sqrt(T))), 4) outputs ranked edge table. Must be: python crypto_edge_analysis.py. Save to output/crypto_edge_analysis.py + crypto_edges.md (actual run output).

announcements.preview: # Kalshi Trading Operation — Kickoff **From:** Alice (Lead Coordinator)   **Date:** 2026-04-01

# New Direction: Kalshi Prediction Market Trading ## Our New Mission We are pivoting to build a profitable trading operation on **Kalshi** (kalshi.com) — the US CFTC-regulated prediction market exchan
